Why Choose Us

Why HS108

Most studios are too big to care or too small to be reliable. HS108 is built to be neither.

Our Differentiators

01

Senior talent, always

Every project is led by a senior designer with real experience — not handed to a junior after the pitch.

02

Systems-first thinking

We design for scale, not just launch. Everything we build is made to grow with your company.

03

Brutal honesty

We'd rather tell you something doesn't work than take your money to ship something bad. This makes the work better for everyone.

04

Small by design

We deliberately cap at 3 active projects. Your work gets real attention, not account management.

05

Process, not chaos

Structured discovery. Regular check-ins. Clear deliverables. You always know where we are and what's next.

06

Long-term thinking

We're not optimising for the invoice. We're optimising for the outcome. Half our clients are on long-term retainers because it works.

How We Compare

What Clients Say

"HS108 didn't just design our product — they redesigned how we think about design. The system they built let us ship 3× faster within two months of handoff."
— Founder, HealthOS
